branch.description: Branch to analyze. Defaults to main.

analyzers.description: Analyzer IDs to run. Defaults to all.

kind.description: Evidence type: file-presence, dependency, config-value, file-content, git-commit, documentation.

source.description: File or package where evidence was found.

kind.description: Evidence type: file-presence, dependency, config-value, file-content, git-commit, documentation.

source.description: File or package where evidence was found.

discovered_count.description: Number of decisions discovered above threshold.

analysis.description: Rich analysis data from the planner.

kind.description: Evidence type: file-presence, dependency, config-value, file-content, git-commit, documentation.

source.description: File or package where evidence was found.

recordable.description: Client-side assessment of whether this task should be captured as a decision record.

signal_types.description: Decision domains detected by the client (e.g. ["technical", "product"]).

DecisionOpsClientHints.description: Optional pre-classification hints from the AI agent. When provided, these take priority over backend heuristics.

repo_ref.description: Optional repository reference as "owner/repo" or a GitHub repository URL. Provide this for repo-bound gate resolution.

project_id.description: Optional project identifier for project-bound gate resolution when no repository context is available.

branch.description: Target branch name. If omitted, the default branch is used when available.

task_summary.description: Short natural-language summary of the task being evaluated.

changed_paths.description: Optional list of changed file paths related to the task.

client_hints.description: Optional pre-classification from the AI agent. The agent has better semantic understanding of the task than keyword heuristics, so when present these hints take priority over backend heuristic scoring. The backend may still override if its own LLM classification is available and disagrees.

recordable.description: Client-side assessment of whether this task should be captured as a decision record.

signal_types.description: Decision domains detected by the client (e.g. ["technical", "product"]).

DecisionOpsPrepareGateInput.description: Input for resolving project context and decision recordability for a repository or project task.

project_id.description: Resolved project identifier for the repository or project context.

repo.description: Normalized repository id in "owner/repo" format, or empty when the gate was resolved from project context only.

branch.description: Resolved branch used for classification, or empty when no repository context is supplied.

recordable.description: Whether this task should be captured as an explicit decision record.

classification_reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the classification result.

suggested_mode.description: Recommended search depth for prior decisions.

DecisionOpsPrepareGateOutput.description: Resolved context and classification result for a potential decision task.

recordable.description: Whether this task should be captured as an explicit decision record.

classification_reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the classification result.

suggested_mode.description: Recommended search depth for prior decisions.

mode.description: Search mode: quick, comprehensive, or custom.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

include_body.description: Whether to include the full body text in results.

candidate_supersedes.description: Accepted decisions that may be superseded by a new decision.

DecisionOpsSearchOutput.description: Decision search results and effective query parameters.

metric.description: Primary metric used to validate the decision outcome.

baseline.description: Current baseline value for the selected metric.

target.description: Expected target value for the selected metric.

by_date.description: Target date (ISO or canonical date string).

DecisionOpsValidationPlan.description: Validation plan for measuring whether a decision is successful.

project_id.description: Project identifier used as the authoring and lookup context.

scope_level.description: Decision scope level: org, project, or repo. Defaults to project.

repo_id.description: Required for repo-scoped drafts when the project has multiple linked repositories. Must be linked to the selected project.

type.description: Decision type: technical, product, business, or governance.

related.description: Related files, links, or decision ids.

supersedes.description: Decision ids superseded by this draft.

single_option_justification.description: Why one option was selected when alternatives were limited.

metric.description: Primary metric used to validate the decision outcome.

baseline.description: Current baseline value for the selected metric.

target.description: Expected target value for the selected metric.

by_date.description: Target date (ISO or canonical date string).

planner_analysis.description: Rich analysis data from the planner, stored in indexingTrace when present.

kind.description: Evidence type: file-presence, dependency, config-value, file-content, git-commit, documentation.

source.description: File or package where evidence was found.

DecisionOpsCreateDraftInput.description: Input for creating a decision draft in the central decision register.

DecisionOpsCreateDraftOutput.description: Result of creating a decision draft.

valid.description: Whether the draft passes validation checks.

DecisionOpsValidateOutput.description: Validation result for a decision draft or existing decision, including scope-resolution checks for inline draft creation.

expected_version.description: Expected current version for optimistic concurrency.

DecisionOpsPublishInput.description: Input for publishing a validated decision.

old_id.description: Decision id superseded by the published decision.

DecisionOpsGetDecisionInput.description: Input for retrieving a decision record in project context.

scope_level.description: Decision scope level: org, project, or repo.

repo.description: Primary repository id in "owner/repo" format for repo-scoped decisions, or empty when not applicable.

branch.description: Branch associated with the primary repository context, or empty when not applicable.

supersedes.description: Decision ids superseded by this decision.

baseline.description: Current baseline value for the selected metric.

target.description: Expected target value for the selected metric.
